languages.text: "Какая деталь? Говори, ублюдок!" {n}Соломон повышает голос и делает шаг к Блефу, явно пытаясь перетянуть на себя внимание и выиграть для Глейто время.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Да? И какая же?" {n}Соломон делает шаг к Блефу, отвлекая его внимание от Глейто.{/n}
traits.speaker: SolomorneCompanion

languages.text: "What detail? Talk, you bastard!" {n}Solomorne raises his voice and takes a step toward Bluff, clearly trying to draw attention to himself and buy Glaito some time.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Какая деталь? Говори, ублюдок!" {n}Соломон повышает голос и делает шаг к Блефу, явно пытаясь перетянуть на себя внимание и выиграть для Глейто время.{/n}

"What detail? Talk, you bastard!" {n}Solomorne raises his voice and takes a step toward Bluff, clearly trying to draw attention to himself and buy Glaito some time.{/n}

languages.text: “什么细节？说清楚，你这个渣滓！”{n}索罗蒙提高了音量，朝闹闹走了一步。很显然，他打算把闹闹的注意力引到他自己身上，为格雷托争取时间。{/n}
languages.original_text: "What detail? Talk, you bastard!" {n}Solomorne raises his voice and takes a step toward Bluff, clearly trying to draw attention to himself and buy Glaito some time.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “什么细节？说清楚，你这个渣滓！”{n}索罗蒙提高了音量，朝闹闹走了一步。很显然，他打算把闹闹的注意力引到他自己身上，为格雷托争取时间。{/n}

languages.text: «¿Qué detalle? ¡Habla, malnacido!», {n}exclama Solomorne dando un paso al frente en un obvio intento de llamar su atención y ganar tiempo para que Glaito se acerque más.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What detail? Talk, you bastard!" {n}Solomorne raises his voice and takes a step toward Bluff, clearly trying to draw attention to himself and buy Glaito some time.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué detalle? ¡Habla, malnacido!», {n}exclama Solomorne dando un paso al frente en un obvio intento de llamar su atención y ganar tiempo para que Glaito se acerque más.{/n}

languages.text: "Ne ayrıntısı? Konuş köpek!" {n}Solomorne, sesini yükseltip Kurusıkı'ya doğru bir adım atıyor. Dikkatini kendine çekmeye ve Glaito'ya zaman kazandırmaya çalıştığı çok açık.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What detail? Talk, you bastard!" {n}Solomorne raises his voice and takes a step toward Bluff, clearly trying to draw attention to himself and buy Glaito some time.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ne ayrıntısı? Konuş köpek!" {n}Solomorne, sesini yükseltip Kurusıkı'ya doğru bir adım atıyor. Dikkatini kendine çekmeye ve Glaito'ya zaman kazandırmaya çalıştığı çok açık.{/n}

languages.text: 「細かいこととは何だ？話せ、馬鹿野郎！」{n}ソロモーンは声を荒げ、ブラフに一歩近づく。明らかに注意を彼自身に向けて、グライトに時間を稼がせようとしている。{/n}
languages.original_text: "What detail? Talk, you bastard!" {n}Solomorne raises his voice and takes a step toward Bluff, clearly trying to draw attention to himself and buy Glaito some time.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「細かいこととは何だ？話せ、馬鹿野郎！」{n}ソロモーンは声を荒げ、ブラフに一歩近づく。明らかに注意を彼自身に向けて、グライトに時間を稼がせようとしている。{/n}

languages.text: « Lequel ? Parlez, enflure ! » {n}s'écrie Solomorne en faisant un pas vers Bluff dans une tentative d'attirer son attention et de faire gagner du temps à Glaito.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What detail? Talk, you bastard!" {n}Solomorne raises his voice and takes a step toward Bluff, clearly trying to draw attention to himself and buy Glaito some time.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Lequel ? Parlez, enflure ! » {n}s'écrie Solomorne en faisant un pas vers Bluff dans une tentative d'attirer son attention et de faire gagner du temps à Glaito.{/n}

languages.text: "Welche Kleinigkeit? Redet, Bastard!" {n}Solomorne erhebt die Stimme und tritt einen Schritt auf Bluff zu, um die Aufmerksamkeit auf sich zu ziehen und Glaito etwas Zeit zu verschaffen.{/n}
